title: Terpenoids: Part XXXVI. A Convenient route for the Syntheses of lsopropenylic Terpenes
author: O. P. Vig
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Through the application of lithium vinyl copper reagent; a· new method of synthesising isopropenylic terpenes has been developed. Based upon this technique, the new and facile syntheses of  \(\beta\) -terpineol, ( \(\pm\) ). carvestrene, ( \(\pm\) ) dipentene,( \(\pm\) ) 1-methyl-4-isopropenyl cyclohexane and( \(\pm\) ) isopulegone have been achieved.
steps_raw: Through the application of lithium vinyl copper reagent; a· new method of synthesising isopropenylic terpenes has been developed. Based upon this technique, the new and facile syntheses of  \(\beta\) -terpineol, ( \(\pm\) ). carvestrene, ( \(\pm\) ) dipentene,( \(\pm\) ) 1-methyl-4-isopropenyl cyclohexane and( \(\pm\) ) isopulegone have been achieved.
